audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass admits up to 4 people at 50% off the regular admission. One member of the party must be a Massachusetts resident. May not be combined with other discounts. For Museum questions visit the HMSC website at hmsc.harvard.edu/visit or call 617-495-3045.
